progress_summary: v1.6 'The instrumented pipeline' BUILD COMPLETE — all 7 sprints shipped to PR #351 (branch claude/charming-knuth-2jyhhf), built straight through. S1 protocol wire 1.1 (cost/eval_scores/telemetry_handle) + scaffolds + flags + symlinks; S2 oc-cost-ops body+refs; S3 oc-telemetry-ops body+refs; S4 ripples (eval_scores in bug-check/code-auditor, monitoring AI template, cost-aware /oc-ops next); S5 /dashboard + /showcase cost + replays flag; S6 lockstep all 24 skills -> 1.6.0 + skills/CHANGELOG.md; S7 honest-staging site surfaces (roadmap-static + changelog v1.6 card) + site-release-surfaces.md checklist + check-release-surfaces.mjs guard. Local gates green every sprint (439 vitest, astro check 0 errors, gen-catalog 24, site build 56 pages). PARKED separately: /demo search (branch claude/relaxed-cannon-ut762y).

key_decisions: Surface: /demo workbench (DesktopWorkbench + MobileWorkbench). Substantial new capability, full pipeline (discover→spec→design→roadmap→build).
Capability: workbench-scoped Search & Filter — NOT merged into the global ⌘K palette (which only indexes pages/skills/actions).
Search depth: DEEP full-text — index every exchange, beat label, and artifact body across all 12 scenarios.
Facets (all four): skill · role (7-role taxonomy from lib/skills.ts) · artifact-kind (needs build-time normalization to a controlled vocab) · pipeline-phase (needs explicit data).
Result behavior: jump-to-exchange + shareable URL state. Deep link opens transcript mode, reveals steps up to/through the target, scrolls + ember-flashes it (reuse existing flash pattern).
Phase data: EXPLICIT `phase` tags added to beats in the walkthrough model; exchanges inherit nearest-preceding beat's phase. Touches all 12 data files.
Mobile: FULL parity — MobileWorkbench gets search + facets + deep-link adapted to the bottom-tab layout.

Stack: inherited/validated (Astro 5 static SSG + Cloudflare Worker ASSETS). No platform/db/auth decision. Build-time index JSON + client filter; zero new runtime deps (hand-rolled, like SearchPalette). MiniSearch noted as fallback only if quality is insufficient.
user_preferences: Picks options when given clear choices; comfortable with 'go with defaults'.
Prefers sharp scoping questions, then approves big plans in one pass.
Answers structured AskUserQuestion rounds quickly and decisively.
Manual deploy from a wrangler-logged-in laptop is the rule; CI is verification-only.

next_actions: Watch PR #351 CI to green (Worker/Site/e2e/LHCI). The changelog e2e nav-timeout seen earlier is a flake (LHCI loads /changelog at 1.00 same runs).

LAUNCH (Phase 7, after merge): oc-release-ops cut -> flip the live-claim site surfaces (Header CURRENT_RELEASE v1.5->v1.6, homepage shipped bar, changelog promote v1.6->Just Released, styleguide badge) per site-release-surfaces.md L1-L7, then npm run deploy:staging (eyeball /dashboard + the rolled surfaces) -> npm run deploy. Optional /oc-audit pre-deploy sweep first (none since v1.3).
After prod deploy: run node scripts/check-release-surfaces.mjs (expect all v1.6), close any deploy-lag issue.

feature.title: Demo Workbench Search & Filter
feature.phase_data: explicit phase tags on beats; exchanges inherit nearest-preceding beat
feature.approach: build-time index + client-side filter; zero new runtime deps
